title: Border and Visa Processing Act
summary: Improves visa processing, asylum review staffing, and border operations coordination.

title: Defense Readiness and Alliance Support Act
summary: Supports military readiness, alliance commitments, and defense logistics coordination.

title: Fentanyl Trafficking and Law Enforcement Act
summary: Strengthens fentanyl interdiction, sentencing tools, and law enforcement coordination.

title: Motion to proceed to consideration
summary: Sets the floor procedure for Senate consideration.
